session_direction.key_assumption: Brent $109 sustained = risk-off bias persists. Trump-Iran nuclear proposal response is binary catalyst for week ahead. Without resolution, market oscillates 23,500-23,800 range with bearish skew. Coal India RIGHT validates Brent>$100 thesis — defensive/PSU/coal continue working; IT/banks under pressure.

scenarios.name: CONTINUATION_DOWN (40%)

scenarios.name: PEACE_BREAKTHROUGH (15%)
scenarios.description: Iran accepts nuclear proposal AND Hormuz commitment → Brent crashes $90-100 → Nifty rallies 23,900-24,100 (+1-2%).

scenarios.name: ESCALATION_CRASH (10%)
scenarios.description: Israel strikes OR Iran kinetic action → Brent spikes $115+ → Nifty -1.5 to -2.5%. Range 23,200-23,500.
